column1: # Each row defines one placement site.
# Sites belong to a programme (via program_slug).
#   name            Display name of the placement site.
#   program_slug    Must match a slug from programs.csv.
#   address         Full address. Optional. Use quotes if contains commas.
#   contact_name    Name of the on-site contact person.
#   contact_email   Email of the on-site contact.
#   focus_areas     Comma-separated. Same values as programs.csv.
#                       Levels: A1 A2 B1 B2 C1 C2 native
#   capacity        Maximum number of volunteers at this site simultaneously.
#   duration_months How long a placement lasts: 3 | 6 | 9 | 12 | 18
